headline: Transcript: Anthony Scaramucci unpacks Trump’s cabinet
summary: Sonja Hutson talks to Anthony Scaramucci and Lauren Fedor
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the FT News Briefing podcast episode: ‘Anthony Scaramucci unpacks Trump’s cabinet’

[MUSIC PLAYING]

Sonja HutsonIt took 10 days after his victory in 2016 for Donald Trump to announce his first cabinet nominee. But he’s working a lot faster this time around. In a little more than two weeks since the 2024 election, Trump has already put forward more than a dozen major nominations.

This is Swamp Notes, the weekly podcast from the FT News Briefing, where we talk about all of the things happening in US politics. I’m Sonja Hutson. And this week we’re asking what do Trump’s cabinet nominees tell us about how his second White House will function. Here with me to discuss is Lauren Fedor. She’s the FT’s deputy Washington bureau chief. Hi, Lauren.

Lauren FedorHi, Sonja.

Sonja HutsonAnd we’ve also got Anthony Scaramucci. He was very briefly communications director for the first Trump administration. He also co-hosts the US version of The Rest is Politics podcast.
